product.name: Adetu Battery Operated Wall Sconce Set of 2, Gold Wireless Battery Wall Lights with 10000mAh RGB Dimmable Magnetic Bulbs and Remote Control, Rechargeable Wall Sconce for Bedroom Living Room Hallway
features: Magnetic LED Bulb: Easy Installation & Removal: Adetu wall sconces set of two comes with two rechargeable 10000mAh magnetic bulb. Secured by magnetism (no twisting required): align and place gently on the holder to install, or remove directly. Perfect for frequent disassembly—more efficient, reduces wear on holder and bulb, and avoids loose/damaged threads from repeated twisting (common with twist-type bulbs).Note: Fully charge before first use. Green light = fully charged.

Dimmable & Color Personalized: Personalize your lighting ambiance with adjustable color temperatures from 2700K to 6000K, five brightness settings and RGB light modes. Whether you need crisp, focused light for reading or soft, warm glow for unwinding, our rechargeable wall sconce delivers a versatile array of lighting choices.

Timing & Setting Recall: Say goodbye to wasted battery and repeated setting adjustments! You can conveniently set a timer for the wall sconces set of two to auto-shutoff after 1-6 hours , aiding in energy conservation and cutting down on idle power use. Even more conveniently, the battery wall sconce will retain your last brightness and color temperature settings when turned off and on again, sparing you the trouble of resetting each time.

Easy Remote Operation: Wireless wall sconces set of two let you fully manage your lighting with the provided remote. Effortlessly adjust brightness and color temperature right from your sofa or desk. A simple button press lets you craft the ideal atmosphere for any moment, whether it's focused work hours or a relaxed night of reading.

Wire-Free Sconces for Hard-to-Wire Spaces: If you need wall sconce lighting but can’t run wires in the wall, our sconces wall decor set of 2 are an ideal choice. These wireless wall sconces set of two require no complex wiring—there’s no need to locate wire connections or fret over plug positions—so they can be installed practically anywhere. They bring a touch of elegance to your bedroom, living room or any space needing soft ambient light, making them perfect for homes with complex wiring.

5-Year Limited Warranty: We provide a 5-year (60-month) warranty against defects in materials and workmanship for all our bedroom wall lamps. If your battery-operated wall sconces fail to function properly due to manufacturing defects within 5 years from purchase, we will offer troubleshooting support or a product replacement. For any issues, please contact us via Amazon Message; we will respond within 24 hours.
